results.title: Can a water leak detector save you from costly water damage?
results.description: Water leak detectors promise peace of mind from water leaks when you are away. But are they worth buying? And is a simple $50 kit as good as an installed $1,000 system?

results.title: Inside Lucy Guo’s Workplace Strategy for Building Retention
results.description: The Passes founder says an emphasis on “emotional” retention changed her company culture for the better.

results.title: AI Slop Is Making Everyone Skeptical. Here Are 3 Ways CEOs Can Build Trust in AI
results.description: Governance and responsibility are non-negotiables, says Mark Surman, president of Mozilla.
